tg.exp_basis: amorphous PLA Tg 331 K (58 C); honest +/-5% band. NOT the exp_lookup single-point [326,327.1].
tg.tg_note: single_rate_fallback_r50; rates [25,50,100]->[464.8,430.0,416.2] INVERTED -> slope-gate FAIL. Raw MD Tg ~430.0 K vs exp 331 K = FAIL (+23.7%); consistent with the well-known glassy MD cooling-rate overestimate (~+100 K) -- offset-corrected Tg lands at exp. Headline property for PLA is DENSITY (PASS), not Tg.

density.exp_basis: amorphous PLA 1.248 g/cm3 +/-5% (crystalline PLLA ~1.290 excluded). polymer_rules PEST density is null; 1.248 is the amorphous literature value.
density.density_note: HEADLINE PASS x4 (PLA glassy: density is the clean validated property). PCFF ~2% low, well inside band.

bulk_modulus.method_note: glassy hierarchy: Murnaghan narrow B0'=30 runaway (invalid) -> deform_3dir fallback (isotropy 8.44%, valid). PASS. Glassy BM hierarchy is Murnaghan-wide -> deform -> fluctuation (NOT uniform fluctuation, which is the rubbery convention). Method+run spread 3.1-5.1 GPa IS the finding: deform clusters in-band, wide-window Murnaghan (PLA4) runs high.

provenance.review_note: PLA replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: removed +100 K md_offset gamed-PASS (PLA1/PLA4); honest single-rate Tg FAIL (all slope-gate inverted); density headline PASS; glassy BM hierarchy per run.
